name: Predictive Evidence-Write Transformer
single_primitive: late candidate-token conditional predictive-information hidden write
load_bearing_transformer: one weight-shared Transformer encodes history-blind candidates and both q,H/q-only predictive contexts
components: monotone exact-identity evidence coordinate in the shared ranking head
base_information_mask: candidate path is [q,c_i] only and cannot attend to history or other candidates
history_information_mask: history enters ranking only through w_i and the exact item-token identity coordinate
no_history_contract: torch.where selects the untouched base_scores tensor bitwise
exact_identity_contract: reserved coordinate log1p(count) is read by softplus(alpha), so the final-logit partial derivative is strictly positive
generic_interface: undifferentiated token IDs and masks; no dataset, category, attribute, or query-type branch
stop_policy: any conjunctive frozen-gate failure closes C10 before real training
